pi_items.source: O*NET Online database confirms ONET code 13-1199.07 is Security Management Specialists
Confirmed via O*NET Online (https://www.onetonline.org/link/summary/13-1199.07) - official SOC code for Security Management Specialists

pi_items.verified_value: Banking / Financial Services (NAICS code 52: Finance and Insurance sector, specifically 522110 for Commercial Banking)
pi_items.source: NAICS classification system - banks classified under Finance and Insurance sector (52). Search confirmed banks belong to financial services industry.

Web searches for 'First National Capital Bank' with $18B in assets returned no results for an institution with this exact name and asset size. Found FNB Corporation ($50B+), First National Capital Corporation (equipment financing), and National Capital Bank (DC-based, smaller), but no exact match.

privileged_info_summary: The task involves a Security Management Specialist (ONET 13-1199.07) employed at a banking/financial services organization. The referenced 2023 MOVEit supply chain breach that targeted financial institutions is real (CVE-2023-34362, CL0P ransomware group, affected 2,700+ organizations). The banking vendors mentioned in task requirements (FIS Global, Jack Henry & Associates, Experian, Symitar) are legitimate real-world vendors serving banking and credit union sectors. The specific organization 'First National Capital Bank' with $18B in assets could not be verified; similar-named institutions exist but do not match the specified name and asset size, suggesting this is a synthetic/fictional organization created for the simulation.
